_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Gregtech New Horizons 2.8.X
author: looordi@orkenstein.com
description:
GTNH egg for versions 2.8.0+ (Java 17-25). Supports stable releases and optional latest daily builds.
Comes with an update script that handles updates easily (custom edits to configs reset on reinstall).
Just change the version and reinstall to update (stable to daily update works too).
Make sure to back up before reinstalling!

Daily builds: set GTNH_DAILY=true to install the latest successful server-new-java GitHub Actions artifact.

More info:
https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Server_Setup#Server_Update

https://www.gtnewhorizons.com/downloads/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# GregTech New Horizons 2.8.X Install Script
# Supports stable releases and optional latest daily build.
# 05.05.2026
# Memory env now deprecated and now this egg uses the containers memory value for the server
# Added support for daily builds

set -euo pipefail
trap 'echo "ERROR: install failed on line $LINENO"; exit 1' ERR

: "${GTVERSION:=2.8.4}"
: "${GTNH_DAILY:=false}"
: "${GITHUB_TOKEN:=}"

BASE_DIR="/mnt/server"
WORK_DIR="$BASE_DIR/.gtnh-install-work"
EXTRACT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/extracted"
ARTIFACT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/artifact"
BACKUP_DIR="$WORK_DIR/backup"

mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR"

echo "Installing dependencies..."
apt update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y curl jq unzip ca-certificates rsync

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"
mkdir -p "$EXTRACT_DIR" "$ARTIFACT_DIR" "$BACKUP_DIR"

github_headers=(
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json"
  -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28"
)

if [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
  github_headers+=(-H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}")
fi

github_api_curl() {
  curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 120 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    "${github_headers[@]}" "$@"
}

github_download_curl() {
  curl -fL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    "${github_headers[@]}" "$@"
}

validate_pack() {
  local dir="$1"

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/java9args.txt" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing java9args.txt"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Pack validation OK."
}

download_stable_to_temp() {
  local zip_file="GT_New_Horizons_${GTVERSION}_Server_Java_17-25.zip"
  local url="https://downloads.gtnewhorizons.com/ServerPacks/${zip_file}"

  echo "Daily builds disabled. Downloading stable GTNH ${GTVERSION}..."
  curl -fL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    -o "$WORK_DIR/$zip_file" "$url"

  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/$zip_file" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

download_daily_to_temp() {
  echo "Daily builds enabled. Searching latest successful GTNH daily server-new-java artifact..."

  if [[ -z "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: GITHUB_TOKEN is required for daily builds."
    echo "GitHub Actions artifact downloads return HTTP 401 without authentication."
    echo "Stable releases do not require a token. Set GTNH_DAILY=false to use stable."
    exit 1
  fi

  local runs_api="https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/workflows/daily-modpack-build.yml/runs?branch=master&status=success&per_page=10"
  local runs_json
  runs_json="$(github_api_curl "$runs_api")"

  local artifact_json=""
  local run_id=""

  while read -r run_id; do
    [[ -z "$run_id" || "$run_id" == "null" ]] && continue

    echo "Checking workflow run ${run_id}..."

    artifact_json="$(
      github_api_curl "https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/runs/${run_id}/artifacts" \
        | jq -c '.artifacts[]? | select((.expired == false) and (.name | endswith("server-new-java")))' \
        | head -n1 || true
    )"

    if [[ -n "$artifact_json" && "$artifact_json" != "null" ]]; then
      break
    fi
  done < <(jq -r '.workflow_runs[].id' <<< "$runs_json")

  if [[ -z "$artifact_json" || "$artifact_json" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not find a non-expired GTNH daily server-new-java artifact."
    exit 1
  fi

  local artifact_name
  local download_url
  artifact_name="$(jq -r '.name' <<< "$artifact_json")"
  download_url="$(jq -r '.archive_download_url' <<< "$artifact_json")"

  echo "Found artifact: ${artifact_name}"
  echo "Downloading daily artifact archive, this will take awhile..."

  if ! github_download_curl -o "$WORK_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" "$download_url"; then
    echo "ERROR: GitHub artifact download failed."
    echo "Check that GITHUB_TOKEN is valid and has read access to GitHub Actions artifacts."
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Extracting artifact archive..."
  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" -d "$ARTIFACT_DIR"

  local daily_zip
  daily_zip="$(
    find "$ARTIFACT_DIR" -type f \( \
      -name '*Server_Java_17-25.zip' -o \
      -name '*server-new-java.zip' -o \
      -name '*.zip' \
    \) | head -n1 || true
  )"

  if [[ -z "$daily_zip" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Daily artifact did not contain a server zip."
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Extracting daily server zip: ${daily_zip}"
  unzip -q -o "$daily_zip" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

case "${GTNH_DAILY,,}" in
  true)
    download_daily_to_temp
    ;;
  false)
    download_stable_to_temp
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: GTNH_DAILY must be true or false."
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

if [[ -d "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Backing up JourneyMapServer..."
  cp -a "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer directory found to back up."
fi

echo "Replacing old GTNH pack files and folders..."
rm -rf \
  "$BASE_DIR/config" \
  "$BASE_DIR/libraries" \
  "$BASE_DIR/mods" \
  "$BASE_DIR/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" \
  "$BASE_DIR/java9args.txt"

rsync -a --no-perms \
  --exclude='.gtnh-install-work' \
  "$EXTRACT_DIR"/ "$BASE_DIR"/

#this fixes daily builds for having weird permissions in them
echo "Fixing file and directory permissions..."
find "$BASE_DIR" -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;
find "$BASE_DIR" -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;

rm -f "$BASE_DIR"/*.bat

if [[ -f "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh" ]]; then
  chmod +x "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh"
fi

if [[ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Restoring JourneyMapServer..."
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/config"
  cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" "$BASE_DIR/config/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer backup found - skipping restore."
fi

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"

echo "Installation process is completed"

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: Required only when GTNH_DAILY=true. Used to download GitHub Actions daily builds. Stable releases do not use this. Only admins see this token

variables.name: Hardcore Mode
variables.description: Enable Hardcore Mode for the world

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Set a total server player limit

variables.name: Modpack version
variables.description: GTNH version for java 17-25 file. Stable 2.8.0 and up supported

variables.name: Old memory env (deprecated)
variables.description:
Legacy compatibility to prevent a crash only if installed using earlier verson of this egg. 
Update startup command manually in admin view if so: 
java -Xms128M -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=90.0 -Dfml.readTimeout=180 @java9args.txt -jar lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar nogui

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Set the query port for the server

variables.name: Server Seed
variables.description: Set a custom seed for the World map

variables.name: Use Daily Builds
variables.description: Use latest GTNH daily server-new-java build instead of stable GTVERSION. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.
